author: Marganotvke
name: Zen Fixes
description: URL bar fixes, audio tab icons, and hides the translation button.

js/reload-urlbar.uc.js.name: Reload URL bar
js/reload-urlbar.uc.js.description: Moves reload into the URL bar and swaps extension controls to the top button row.

js/tab-audio-click.uc.js.name: Tab audio icon click
js/tab-audio-click.uc.js.description: Mute/unmute when clicking anywhere on the tab favicon area.
